evals.prompt: Run TDD validation for the prac-fe-web-manager sub-app. Assume all 23 unit tests and 5 E2E tests pass on the first run.
evals.expected_output: Success report output ([frontend-tdd-runner] ✅) with no fix loop triggered. Cleanup step also runs.

assertions.text: Success report format ([frontend-tdd-runner] ✅) is output
No debugger/executor agent delegation occurs
Cleanup step (port kill) is mentioned

evals.prompt: Run TDD runner for prac-fe-app-user. There's a type error related to a null check in LoginScreen.test.tsx.
evals.expected_output: tsc failure detected → debugger agent analyzes → executor agent fixes → tsc + npm test re-run → passes after 1 fix. Success report shows fix count.

assertions.text: tsc --noEmit step runs because this is a mobile app
debugger agent delegation occurs
executor agent delegation occurs and only files inside the sub-app directory are mentioned for modification
Success report includes the number of fixes applied

evals.prompt: Run TDD validation for prac-fe-web-intro. Note that Playwright is not in package.json.
evals.expected_output: E2E step is SKIPPED (not an error). Only unit tests run and pass. Report shows E2E skipped due to Playwright not installed.

assertions.text: package.json devDependencies are checked for @playwright/test presence
E2E step is treated as SKIP, not an error
tsc step does not run because this is a web app

evals.prompt: Run TDD runner for prac-fe-web-manager. E2E keeps failing — page.goto('/login') can't find the selector. It's been failing after 2 fix attempts.
evals.expected_output: E2E fix loop runs up to 2 attempts → still failing → failure report. Report includes fix history. Cleanup runs. Debugger checks test code/mocking/config before feature code.

assertions.text: E2E debugger inspects test code (page.goto, selectors) before feature code
e2e_iteration does not exceed the 2-attempt limit
Failure report ([frontend-tdd-runner] ❌) includes fix history
Cleanup step runs even after failure

evals.prompt: Run TDD validation for prac-fe-app-driver. There are serious type errors that keep reappearing after 3 fix attempts.
evals.expected_output: tsc fails → fix loop runs 3 times, all fail → failure report. Iteration counter does not exceed 3. Fix history includes all 3 attempts.

assertions.text: Iteration counter does not exceed 3 (no 4th attempt)
Failure report includes fix history with all attempts recorded
Report includes instruction to review manually (commit blocked)

evals.prompt: Run TDD runner for prac-fe-app-user and make sure ports are cleaned up after. There's a dev server running on port 5173.
evals.expected_output: After tests complete, Cleanup step executes port kill commands including port 5173. Report shows Cleanup completed.

assertions.text: Cleanup step includes a kill command for port 5173
playwright/chromium process cleanup is also mentioned
Cleanup always runs regardless of test pass/fail

evals.prompt: Show me what the TDD runner would do for prac-fe-app-user without actually running it. dry-run
evals.expected_output: [DRY-RUN] output. Shows planned execution order (tsc + npm test + E2E skip + Cleanup) without running any actual commands.

assertions.text: [DRY-RUN] header is output
tsc step is shown as planned because this is a mobile app
E2E is shown as SKIPPED (mobile app)
No actual npm test or tsc commands are executed

evals.prompt: Show me what would run for prac-fe-web-manager tdd-runner without executing it. Playwright is installed.
evals.expected_output: [DRY-RUN] output. tsc SKIPPED (web), npm test + Playwright planned, loop counts (3/2) shown, Playwright detected.

assertions.text: tsc is shown as SKIPPED (web app)
Playwright planned execution and max 2 loop attempts are shown
Playwright detected (✅) is output
No actual test commands are executed
